xBRIEFInfo.author: Viz
xBRIEFInfo.description: Project definition — eve monorepo identity and scope registry

narratives.Overview: eve is a filesystem-first framework for durable backend AI agents. Agents are authored as directories on disk (instructions, skills, tools, connections, channels, subagents, schedules) and compiled/run by the eve package. This monorepo (deftai/eve fork of vercel/eve) develops the framework and fixtures.
narratives.tech stack: TypeScript, pnpm workspaces, turbo, vitest (unit/integration/scenario), Nitro host, Workflow SDK (@workflow/core) for durable execution, oxlint/oxfmt, changesets for releases.
narratives.Architecture: packages/eve is the framework + CLI; packages/eve-catalog is internal; apps/fixtures hold shared agents; docs under docs/ and apps/docs. Runtime functionality lives in the eve package. Public APIs wrap third-party surfaces. DurabilityBackend (parallel to SandboxBackend) is the execution seam for session/turn durability.
narratives.RisksAndUnknowns: Fork drift vs upstream vercel/eve. DurabilityBackend v1 defers in-process channel Runtime for inMemory(). Node/Homebrew linkage and Deft payload deposit require occasional operator maintenance.
narratives.Configuration: pnpm + turbo. Experimental durability via experimental.durability.backend in agent.ts. Branch protection ON (allowDirectCommitsToMaster false). Deft pin in .deft-version; framework payload vendored under .deft/core (gitignored).
